top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN d.dob < '1985-01-01' AND l.lap > 50 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN drivers d ON l.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN l.lap > 50 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN drivers d ON l.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005
  AND d.dob < '1985-01-01';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN d.dob < '1985-01-01' AND l.lap > 50 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN drivers d ON l.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.dob < '1985-01-01' AND l.lap > 50) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN drivers d ON l.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN l.lap > 50 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN drivers d ON l.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005
  AND d.dob < '1985-01-01';

FROM lapTimes l
JOIN drivers d ON l.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.dob < '1985-01-01' AND l.lap > 50) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN drivers d ON l.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN l.lap > 50 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN drivers d ON l.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005
  AND d.dob < '1985-01-01';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN d.dob < '1985-01-01' AND l.lap > 50 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN drivers d ON l.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005;
